decoder_heading: Privacy Policy
ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: MapFactor Navigator (MapFactor GPS Navigation Maps) is a free turn-by-turn GPS navigation app for Android, iOS and Windows devices using OpenStreetMaps data. Maps are installed on your device so there is no need for an Internet connection when travelling.
